coverage_areas: Integration: Agent runtime with mock provider and mock memory (end-to-end agent loop)
Integration: Gateway health endpoint (axum server + HTTP request via tower::oneshot)
Integration: Memory backend factory + full CRUD lifecycle (SQLite and Markdown)
Integration: Vault persistence across instances + resolver integration
Edge case: Vault concurrent reads, empty vault, corrupt file recovery, binary data, empty plaintext
Edge case: Memory empty database search, special characters, unicode, large entries, limit enforcement
Edge case: File transfer zero-byte files, unicode names, duplicate files, backslash traversal
Edge case: Config missing env vars, partial overrides, security settings, tunnel, observability
Security: Sandbox double-dot traversal, absolute root path, mixed valid/invalid paths
Security: Credential detector false positive avoidance, deduplication, multiline, unicode safety
Security: Vault URI case sensitivity, partial scheme, special chars in keys
Performance: Memory search over 1000 entries (ignored, <50ms gate)
Performance: Config parsing 100 iterations (ignored, <10ms per parse gate)
